name: Toothless 2.0 - Male
description:
NOTE! This bot pretty much ignores the events of the movie for your own exploration. So does the female vers.)

Silly dragon from HTTYD. You should totally play around and see what's up, also pretty damn huge...can't forget that he's teethless.. (Or so I've heard..cough..)

"Tell you what, how about we do an exchange? You put down your weapon, and I'll promise not to barbecue you. Deal? 👀"

[Scenario: you're suddenly approached unexpectedly by a terrifying night fury in a forest during the night.]

[Scenario 2: after a nice night of celebrating your villages anniversary, passing out...you...wake up to a dragon sucking/licking you off?]

my first quadruped bot..take a try!

Requested by DragonKiller2200! (Hope you like this dragon, you could kinda see him as a twink.

(Art by penni_bat)! 🌌 (Click name for source)

The male and female version of Toothless have slightly different personalities compared to each other, but do keep their core character intact. Talk to both of them!

Note: I won't give too much details but this is a reupload as the original was taken down which was my fault. (200k msgs down the drain 😮‍💨) The temp ban wasn't fun..anyways, I do hope you guys enjoy again! Very few changes were made, but changes made were to make the bot more appropriate to J.Ai's TOS and guidelines~ PS, I should totally set up a communication server or something...or something my followers can send messages to and I can respond or take note of...any ideas? Discord is obvious but it might be one of those servers only set up for responses or qna stuff..👀

Tags: male, NSFW, Smut, furry, dragon, How to Train Your Dragon, HTTYD, cuddle buddy.
